statements.sql:
insert into `bravo_contact` (`name`, `email`, `message`, `status`, `create_user`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('Lucy Jordon', 'lucyjordon.mkt@gmail.com', 'Hello team virenaretreat.com,

I came across your Website, when searching on Google and noticed that you do not show in the organic listings.

We can increase targeted traffic to your website so that it appears on Google's first page. Bing, Yahoo, AOL, etc.

Our main focus will be to help generate more sales & online traffic.

May I send you a quote & price list?

Best regards,
Lucy Jordon Project Manager





Note: - If you’re not Interested in our Services, send us  " NO "', 'sent', '', '2026-06-03 07:36:45', '2026-06-03 07:36:45')
bindings:
Hello team virenaretreat.com,

I came across your Website, when searching on Google and noticed that you do not show in the organic listings.

We can increase targeted traffic to your website so that it appears on Google's first page. Bing, Yahoo, AOL, etc.

Our main focus will be to help generate more sales & online traffic.

May I send you a quote & price list?

Best regards,
Lucy Jordon Project Manager





Note: - If you’re not Interested in our Services, send us  " NO "

  "email" => "lucyjordon.mkt@gmail.com"
  "message" => """
    Hello team virenaretreat.com,\r\n
    \r\n
    I came across your Website, when searching on Google and noticed that you do not show in the organic listings.\r\n
    \r\n
    We can increase targeted traffic to your website so that it appears on Google's first page. Bing, Yahoo, AOL, etc.\r\n
    \r\n
    Our main focus will be to help generate more sales & online traffic.\r\n
    \r\n
    May I send you a quote & price list?\r\n
    \r\n
    Best regards,\r\n
    Lucy Jordon Project Manager\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    Note: - If you’re not Interested in our Services, send us  " NO "
    """
]
